---
title: "Obesity Level Predictive Modeling"
author: "Kaylen Ton"
---

### Load in the data

```{r - packages and data}

library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)

mydata <- read_csv("ObesityData.csv")

```

### Cleaning the data
* Rounding different variables by different decimal places
* Remove un-interpretable variable: HVAC (?)

```{r}

cleaned_data <- mydata %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>% 
  mutate(Age = round(Age, 0))

```

# **Modeling**

## Preprocessing

```{r}

set.seed(73)
split <- initial_split(cleaned_data, strata = NObeyesdad)

obesity_train <- training(split)
obesity_test <- testing(split)

```

### EDA
```{r}

obesity_train %>% 
  select_if(is.numeric) %>% 
  cor()

# The highest correlations between variables stays under |.32|

```

## Specify Model

```{r}

tree_model <- decision_tree(
  # cost_complexity = tune(),
  # tree_depth = tune(),
  # min_n = tune()
  ) %>% 
  set_engine('rpart') %>% 
  set_mode('classification')

```

## Feature Engineering

```{r}

tree_recipe <- recipe(NObeyesdad ~ ., data = obesity_train) %>% 
  step_dummy(all_nominal(), -all_outcomes())

```

## Fitting Models

```{r}

# Create workflow - combines my model specification and recipe to train a parsnip model and recipe object at the same time.
tree_workflow <- workflow() %>% 
  add_model(tree_model) %>% 
  add_recipe(tree_recipe)

# Cross Validation and Hyper-parameter Tuning
    tree_folds <- vfold_cv(obesity_train, v = 10,
                           strata = NObeyesdad)
    
    # Configure custom metrics
    tree_metrics <- metric_set(roc_auc, sens, spec)
    
    # Fit resamples
    tree_fit_resample <- tree_workflow %>% 
      fit_resamples(resamples = tree_folds,
                    metrics = tree_metrics) # ERROR 2
    
    tree_fit_rs_result <- tree_fit_resample %>% 
      collect_metrics(summarize = F)
    
    tree_fit_rs_result %>%
      group_by(.metric) %>%
      summarize(min = min(.estimate),
      median = median(.estimate),
      max = max(.estimate))
    
    tree_workflow
    
    tree_grid <- grid_random(parameters(tree_model),
                             size = 10) # ERROR
    

# Training workflow
tree_workflow_fit <- tree_workflow %>% 
  last_fit(split = split)

tree_workflow_fit %>% 
  collect_metrics()

```

## Comparing Models
